title: 鄂西山灵
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年），鄂西姊陵坪。巫师家发生命案，六名嫌疑人各有动机。在这座隐藏着山灵传说的寨子里，真凶就藏在幸存者之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Western Hubei mountain village, traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Chinese mountain village murder mystery. Traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, six silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
